programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: (M) The team has a shocking sighting, only to see the lead slip through their fingers. But a groundbreaking tip leads Bryce to change plans and relocate to a new Bigfoot hot spot.

programme.title: Monsterquest
programme.sub-title: Special - Ep 7 Best of: The Hunt for Real Dragons
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Flight 1628 and The Giant Thunderbird
programme.desc: (PG) One of the most-famous UFO cases of all time occurs in the skies above Alaska, when an unidentified flying object pursues a Boeing 747.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
